description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named Test: fingerprint that runs on weekdays at 21:00 and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow checks repository activity and conditionally runs fingerprint tests in debug and release modes with a matrix of splits. If the repository has been active in the last 24 hours, the workflow checks out two repositories, restores a ccache, installs dependencies, builds and tests the code, and runs fingerprint tests.
